value.found_quote: ## Supported Tools\n\nFor `PreToolUse` and `PostToolUse` matchers, you can match against the following tool names, grouped by category:
value.rationale: The page, hosted on Google's antigravity.google domain documenting Antigravity 2.0, contains a "Supported Tools" section listing the tool names available for hook matchers. This directly substantiates that Google offers Supported Tools as part of the Antigravity Hooks feature. The page presents it as a current, documented feature with no mention of deprecation or preview status.
